title: A drink I make at home
summary: Name a drink you make at home and describe the ingredients and steps.
topic: A drink I make at home
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about a drink you make at home. Say what it is, list the ingredients, and describe how you make it. Use present simple and sequence words like first, then, and after that.
hintStarters: My favorite drink to make at home is…
sampleText: My favorite drink to make at home is ginger and lemon tea. I make it almost every evening in my kitchen in Nairobi. I need three things: fresh ginger, half a lemon, and a teaspoon of honey. First, I cut a small piece of ginger and I put it in a cup. Then I pour hot water over it and I wait for two minutes. After that, I squeeze the lemon into the cup. Finally, I add one teaspoon of honey and I stir everything together. The drink is warm and has a strong, spicy taste. I love the smell of ginger in the kitchen. I always drink this tea after dinner because it helps my stomach. Sometimes I add a little cinnamon on top. This drink is very easy to make and it has no sugar except the honey. My mother gave me this recipe when I was a child. I still make it exactly the same way.

sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: khuấy tất cả lại với nhau
không có đường ngoại trừ mật ong

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Sequence words: first, then, after that, finally
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng từ trình tự để mô tả các bước: 'First, I cut … Then I pour … After that, I squeeze … Finally, I add …'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use sequence words to order steps: 'First … Then … After that … Finally …' — each introduces the next action.

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Present simple for instructions and recipes
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Trong công thức hoặc hướng dẫn, dùng thì hiện tại đơn: 'I cut', 'I pour', 'I stir'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Recipes and instructions use the present simple: 'I cut a small piece of ginger', 'I pour hot water over it'.

sampleTranslationVi: Thức uống yêu thích tôi pha ở nhà là trà gừng chanh. Tôi pha gần như mỗi tối trong bếp của mình ở Nairobi. Tôi cần ba thứ: gừng tươi, nửa quả chanh vàng và một thìa cà phê mật ong. Đầu tiên, tôi cắt một miếng gừng nhỏ và cho vào tách. Sau đó tôi đổ nước nóng lên trên và chờ hai phút. Tiếp theo, tôi vắt chanh vào tách. Cuối cùng, tôi thêm một thìa cà phê mật ong và khuấy tất cả lại với nhau. Thức uống ấm và có vị đậm, cay. Tôi yêu mùi gừng trong bếp. Tôi luôn uống trà này sau bữa tối vì nó tốt cho dạ dày. Đôi khi tôi thêm một ít quế lên trên. Thức uống này rất dễ làm và không có đường ngoại trừ mật ong. Mẹ tôi cho tôi công thức này khi tôi còn nhỏ. Tôi vẫn làm theo đúng cách đó.

mcQuestions.prompt: What drink does the writer make?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'My favorite drink to make at home is ginger and lemon tea'.
mcQuestions.hint: The first sentence names the drink.

mcQuestions.prompt: How many main ingredients are in the drink?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'I need three things: fresh ginger, half a lemon, and a teaspoon of honey'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the writer do after pouring the hot water?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'I pour hot water over it and I wait for two minutes'.

mcQuestions.prompt: Why does the writer drink this tea after dinner?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'I always drink this tea after dinner because it helps my stomach'.

mcQuestions.prompt: Where did the writer get this recipe?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'My mother gave me this recipe when I was a child'.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sequence word shows the last step?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'Finally' introduces the last action in a sequence.
mcQuestions.hint: Which word closes a list of steps?

options: Put the lemon in the cup.
Press the lemon to get the juice out.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'squeeze' means to press firmly to extract juice.
mcQuestions.hint: Think about how you get juice from a lemon.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence correctly uses 'first' as a sequence word?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'First, I cut …' — sequence word at the start, followed by a comma.
mcQuestions.hint: Sequence words usually come at the start of the sentence.

mcQuestions.prompt: What optional spice does the writer sometimes add?
mcQuestions.explanation: 'Sometimes I add a little cinnamon on top'.

options: Making you feel cool and energetic.
mcQuestions.explanation: 'refreshing' describes a drink that makes you feel better or more awake.
mcQuestions.hint: Think about how a cold drink feels on a hot day.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence best describes what honey adds to the drink?
mcQuestions.explanation: Honey is naturally sweet, and the text says 'no sugar except the honey'.
mcQuestions.hint: Think about the taste of honey.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why do many people prefer to make a hot drink from natural ingredients rather than buy a ready-made drink?
